name: Rancher Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a saucepan over medium heat until crisp. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
2. Add scallions, green bell peppers, onions, and garlic to the pan. Heat and stir for 5-6 minutes or until softened.
3. Add green beans, sugar, white wine, and red wine vinegar to the pan. Cover and simmer for 4-5 minutes.
4. Stir in red pepper flakes and reserved bacon. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
5. Continue simmering until the green beans are tender. Toss well before serving.
6. Serve hot.
